title: Review: sieve-form 0.1.0 iteration 3 bikeshed check
notes:
BIKESHED CONFIRMED: No new correctness bugs in iteration 3. All six targeted questions verified clean.
Iteration 3 confidence: 95%. Least confident: (a) for_each_clause includes TestList form in visit slice but this is harmless since no Tag forms inside TestList; (b) sole unsupported-but-not-checked extension scenario would be if allof/anyof test names themselves were extension-gated but they are base RFC 5228. SEC7: NO (no security issues found)
